steps.title: Use the site count
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize the number of sites containing pre-Clovis items. The key note is that more than a dozen such North American sites have been identified.

steps.title: Focus on quantity
steps.content: A focuses on Clovis settlement, C focuses on the age of Cedar Marsh items, and D names Cedar Marsh without conveying the number of similar sites. The sentence placing Cedar Marsh among more than a dozen such locations emphasizes the number of pre-Clovis sites. The answer is B.
